goal: Extend the 5-part kitting station (CP-NEW-kit-prep-operator) with overhead-camera completeness verification: after Franka places all 5 parts into the kit tray, a nadir camera captures the tray, vision_detect_objects counts occupied slots, and any missing part triggers a re-pick from its source bin. Exercises setup_pick_place_with_vision for the re-pick loop, set_camera_params + set_camera_look_at for the overhead inspection camera, and add_vision_classifier_gate to route the vision result into a re-pick decision gate. ONET SOC 51-2098 kit-prep operator — vision-verified completeness check.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-kit-prep-vision-gate:

1) Base scene identical to CP-NEW-kit-prep-operator: Franka on 0.75m table, 5 source bins in fan layout, 5-slot linear kit tray at [0,-0.52,0.775]. All geometry and physics config reused.

2) Overhead inspection camera: placed at [0, -0.52, 1.60] (directly above tray centre). set_camera_look_at points it down to tray origin [0,-0.52,0.775]. set_camera_params sets focal_length=18mm for wide field: covers full 0.55m tray width at 0.825m height. Camera prim at /World/InspectCamera.

3) First pass — run base pick-place: setup_pick_place_controller handles the initial 5-pick sequence exactly as kit-prep-operator. Parts land in slots; tray settle time ~5s.

4) Vision completeness check: add_vision_classifier_gate classifies which tray slots appear occupied. class_labels=['slot_occupied','slot_empty']. destination_map={'slot_empty': re-pick trigger}. camera_path=/World/InspectCamera.

5) Re-pick loop: setup_pick_place_with_vision handles the vision-driven fallback — it calls add_vision_classifier_gate internally, maps empty slot back to its source part path, and re-runs a pick for any slot_empty classification. cube_paths are the 5 part paths; class_labels=['PCB','screw','housing','label','bracket'] (semantic labels already set). destination_map maps each label to its kit tray slot drop target.

6) Why setup_pick_place_with_vision not just a second setup_pick_place_controller: the vision gate makes the re-pick conditional on actual occupancy state — avoids double-placing already-placed parts if first pass succeeded on all 5.

7) Physics: same as kit-prep-operator — CPU dynamics, rubber material, sleepThreshold=0.0.

8) Slot positions (same as base): linear_5, slot_spacing=0.10 → x offsets [-0.20,-0.10,0.00,+0.10,+0.20], y=-0.52, drop_z=0.830.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Robot work table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.4, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics scene ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka Panda ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── 5 source bins ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
bin_positions = [
    [-0.40,  0.35, 0.775],
    [ 0.00,  0.35, 0.775],
    [ 0.40,  0.35, 0.775],
    [-0.30, -0.30, 0.775],
    [ 0.30, -0.30, 0.775],
]
for i, pos in enumerate(bin_positions):
    bp = f"/World/Bin_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=bp, prim_type="Cube", position=pos, scale=[0.055, 0.055, 0.025])
    apply_api_schema(prim_path=bp, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── 5 distinct parts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
part_labels   = ["PCB", "screw", "housing", "label", "bracket"]
part_positions = [
    [-0.40,  0.35, 0.825],
    [ 0.00,  0.35, 0.825],
    [ 0.40,  0.35, 0.825],
    [-0.30, -0.30, 0.825],
    [ 0.30, -0.30, 0.825],
]
part_paths = [f"/World/Part_{i+1}" for i in range(5)]

for path, pos, label in zip(part_paths, part_positions, part_labels):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=pos, size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=label)

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=part_paths, attr="physics:mass", value=0.2)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=part_paths, attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in part_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# ── Kit tray ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_kit_tray(
    tray_path="/World/KitTray",
    position=[0, -0.52, 0.775],
    tray_size=[0.55, 0.10, 0.03],
    slot_layout="linear_5",
    slot_size=0.05,
    slot_spacing=0.10,
)

drop_targets = {
    "/World/Part_1": [-0.20, -0.52, 0.830],
    "/World/Part_2": [-0.10, -0.52, 0.830],
    "/World/Part_3": [ 0.00, -0.52, 0.830],
    "/World/Part_4": [ 0.10, -0.52, 0.830],
    "/World/Part_5": [ 0.20, -0.52, 0.830],
}

# ── Phase 1: base pick-place (no vision) ──────────────────────────────────────
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=part_paths,
    destination_path="/World/KitTray",
    drop_targets=drop_targets,
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/KitTray",
                        "/World/Bin_1", "/World/Bin_2", "/World/Bin_3",
                        "/World/Bin_4", "/World/Bin_5"],
)

# ── Overhead inspection camera ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Nadir view of kit tray at z=1.60; covers full 0.55m tray width.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/InspectCamera", prim_type="Camera")
set_camera_params(
    camera_path="/World/InspectCamera",
    params={"focal_length": 18.0, "horizontal_aperture": 20.955},
)
set_camera_look_at(
    camera_path="/World/InspectCamera",
    target=[0.0, -0.52, 0.775],
    eye=[0.0, -0.52, 1.60],
)

# ── Phase 2: vision-verified completeness re-pick ─────────────────────────────
# add_vision_classifier_gate detects any empty slots; setup_pick_place_with_vision
# uses the same overhead camera and semantic labels for conditional re-pick.
add_vision_classifier_gate(
    cube_paths=part_paths,
    class_labels=["PCB", "screw", "housing", "label", "bracket"],
    camera_path="/World/InspectCamera",
    destination_map={
        "PCB":     [-0.20, -0.52, 0.830],
        "screw":   [-0.10, -0.52, 0.830],
        "housing": [ 0.00, -0.52, 0.830],
        "label":   [ 0.10, -0.52, 0.830],
        "bracket": [ 0.20, -0.52, 0.830],
    },
)

setup_pick_place_with_vision(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    cube_paths=part_paths,
    class_labels=["PCB", "screw", "housing", "label", "bracket"],
    camera_path="/World/InspectCamera",
    destination_map={
        "PCB":     "/World/KitTray",
        "screw":   "/World/KitTray",
        "housing": "/World/KitTray",
        "label":   "/World/KitTray",
        "bracket": "/World/KitTray",
    },
    destination_path="/World/KitTray",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/KitTray",
                        "/World/Bin_1", "/World/Bin_2", "/World/Bin_3",
                        "/World/Bin_4", "/World/Bin_5"],
)
failure_modes: add_vision_classifier_gate may misclassify a tray slot if part is partially off-centre — increase slot_size to 0.06 or run with fov=45 for tighter FOV.

setup_pick_place_with_vision re-pick may double-pick an already-placed part if the vision result returns 'PCB' for a seated part whose semantic label is visible from above — add confidence threshold or check slot occupancy by z-height first.
Overhead camera at z=1.60 may clip the DomeLight geometry — ensure DomeLight has no mesh; it is a light prim only.
set_camera_params focal_length=18mm may produce barrel distortion at tray edges — increase to 24mm if slot classification fails at x=±0.20.
Phase 2 re-pick IK may fail if part fell out of source bin during Phase 1 — guard with get_bounding_box on source bin before re-pick attempt.

workpieces.note: Part order matches slot order; Part_N → slot_N

code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.4, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)
part_paths = [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}]
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=part_paths,
    destination_path={{kit_tray.path}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{kit_tray.path}}],
)
create_prim(prim_path={{inspect_camera.path}}, prim_type="Camera")
set_camera_params(
    camera_path={{inspect_camera.path}},
    params={"focal_length": {{inspect_camera.focal_length}}, "horizontal_aperture": 20.955},
)
set_camera_look_at(
    camera_path={{inspect_camera.path}},
    target={{inspect_camera.target}},
    eye={{inspect_camera.position}},
)
add_vision_classifier_gate(
    cube_paths=part_paths,
    class_labels=[{{workpieces[0].label}}, {{workpieces[1].label}}, {{workpieces[2].label}}, {{workpieces[3].label}}, {{workpieces[4].label}}],
    camera_path={{inspect_camera.path}},
)
setup_pick_place_with_vision(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    cube_paths=part_paths,
    class_labels=[{{workpieces[0].label}}, {{workpieces[1].label}}, {{workpieces[2].label}}, {{workpieces[3].label}}, {{workpieces[4].label}}],
    camera_path={{inspect_camera.path}},
    destination_map={{{workpieces[0].label}}: {{kit_tray.path}}, {{workpieces[1].label}}: {{kit_tray.path}}},
    destination_path={{kit_tray.path}},
)
extension_notes: Adds overhead inspection camera + vision-gate re-pick pass on top of the base 5-part kitting canonical. setup_pick_place_with_vision is the incremental driver; add_vision_classifier_gate runs before it to build class→slot routing. No new conveyor or robot; same Franka geometry.
